# My Family History Book

> A calm, private place to preserve your family's stories, photos, and voices — arranged into a beautifully crafted book made to be shared for generations.

## About
- [Home](/): Product overview, pricing, and getting started
- [About](/about): Our mission and how the product is built
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team

## Content
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on preserving family stories, memoirs, and legacy
